ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the app */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the app */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the app */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the app */,
  "popularity" TEXT /* Popularity score of the app */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the app was released */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the app was last updated */,
  "bundle_id" TEXT /* Bundle ID of the app */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the app's icon */,
  "screenshot_urls" TEXT /* Comma-separated URLs of the app's screenshots */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the app */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the app */,
  "reviews_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the app */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (for sub-genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the publisher */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the app */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "binary_size" INTEGER /* Size of the app binary in bytes */,
  "minimum_os_version" TEXT /* Minimum OS version required to run the app */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., publisher, developer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the app */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the app was downloaded */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the download (e.g., iOS, Android) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* OS version of the device */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the download occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_downloads_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_reviews_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, refund) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_transactions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_categories" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "genre_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
